title: shureee's Terraria: Terraspark Boots
body:
## Data Pack Version Download
→ Versions
→ Click on the desired release (not download yet)
→ Download both data and resource pack

# shureee's Terraria 2.0: Terraspark Boots

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hYCUZRa5hvI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# General Description

### Hello Everyone!
This is my attempt at recreating the Terraspark Boots from Terraria. The Accessories are scattered all over the world in some structures, dropped by mobs or obtained by fishing. There's also one block - the Tinkerer's Workshop - which can be half of the time purchased from a Wandering Trader. Here you can combine previously found Accessories.

### But what are those Accessories?
Well, if you've ever had a chance to play Terraria, Accessories are items that can be equipped and give you special abilities, among others such as flight or water walking. Later, those can be merged into more complex Accessories. For example: by combining both Hermes Boots (that grand the player superfast running) and Rocket Boots (that allow flight) the player receives the Specter Boots which grand you both of the abilities. All details regarding that can be found in the Guide.

### What Guide? - You may ask.
So, the first thing that you'll get to see when entering a new world is a message saying, that you can enter [ /trigger guide ] to obtain one. Doing so, the player gets a special Guide that will aid you with every single little thing that you may ask for, so no worries!

### Can I try this in Survival Mode then?
Yes, the data pack is specially prepared for survival experience, so I strongly encourage you to try it out and share your thoughts on my Discord!

I'd also try to expand and update it further with other accessories and so on. As for now, there are only accessories related to the Terraspark Boots' Crafting Tree. If you have any suggestions please share them with me!
 
# Features

### Crafting Tree:

![Crafting Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/059c498c1222e84d8068131cdd3e9edbd1d80425.png)

## List of Items:
### Everything is described within the Guide
- Aglet
- Amphibian Boots
- Anklet of the Wind
- Dunerider Boots
- Fairy Boots
- Flame Waker Boots
- Flower Boots
- Flurry Boots
- Frog Leg
- Frostspark Boots
- Guide
- Hellfire Treads
- Hermes Boots
- Ice Skates
- Lava Charm
- Lava Waders
- Lightning Boots
- Magma Skull
- Molten Charm
- Moltern Skull Rose
- Obsidian Rose
- Obsidian Skull
- Obsidian Skull Rose
- Obsidian Water Walking Boots
- Rocket Boots
- Sailfish Boots
- Specter Boots
- Terraspark Boots
- Tinkerer's Workshop
- Water Walking Boots

## Tinkerer's Workshop
### Crafting Station:
The player can put items on top of it in order to craft new items

![Tinkerer's Workshop with Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84b405c3a7b2e72729675059b2f90b5e11742b85_0.webp)

If right-clicked, the player receives the Guide.
It can also be used for decorative purposes due to the Table allowing players to put any items on top

## Advancement Tree

![Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef8b57c8b644aa61b79d0a8816949403573a89a1.png)

## Supported Languages (7)
- English (all varieties - difference in spelling of "Specter/Spectre")
- German
- Spanish (all varieties)
- French
- LOLcat
- Polish
- Toki Pona
